description: L8 auto-download size limit (coverage-widening, hermetic): drive l3_set_setting autoDownloadSizeLimit and prove it round-trips through l3_dump_state.autoDownloadSizeLimit (30->13->30). autoDownloadSizeLimit is a GLOBAL int (MB) read by the file auto-accept/auto-download path (Prefs.getAutoDownloadSizeLimit; the desktop default is 30 MB, mobile 5 MB). This gate runs on the macOS L3 host, so the seeded default is 30. Uses EXACT-value polling (state_equals) for the scalar field so a substring match can't false-green (codex P2). Soft precondition (starts 30) catches a dirty fixture; ends restored to 30 so the fixture self-cleans even if interrupted. The download-DIRECTORY half (downloadsDirectory) is also surfaced in l3_dump_state for read assertions but is not toggled here (it is a native folder picker). Hermetic — no echo peer. Maps to feature L8.
